title: AvatarDonation
description: AvatarDonation is a plugin made to make server donators feel special when they donate to the server and thank them in a special way. Also, you can play special effects to all players online when there is a donation on the
body:
![1](https://i.imgur.com/wo1SChL.png) [![wiki](https://i.imgur.com/lbu5Qsm.png)](https://aglerr.gitbook.io/wiki/theonly-series/the-only-donations) [![discord](https://i.imgur.com/vp7xnaX.png)](https://muhammaddaffa.com/discord) # AvatarDonation is a plugin made to make server donators feel special when they donate to the server and thank them in a special way. Also, you can play special effects to all players online when there is a donation on the ![img2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7bd42a6708c5342d7c19d38cffa1acd4402dee1d.gif) ![img3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4743f6444078891e0b4527e41ef311b0ffb61c22.gif) ![img4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd41772cd9955157ea1f7b7887ebe33e750e6c36_0.webp) ![img5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/130f8f108d7462305a3c6eb9ad593232c0fe29f8.gif) # Why TheOnly-Donations? ## Free plugin with premium feeling > You can use this plugin at no cost, but that doesn't mean this plugin doesn't have any qualities ## Monthly Donation > Create a goal for your server and your player with a monthly donation goal, executes commands, and give appreciation upon reaching the monthly donation goal.
# Installation - This plugin isn't dependent on any plugins. - Install this plugin to your server. - Install [PlaceholderAPI](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/placeholderapi.6245/) (Optional) - Install [SkinsRestorer](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/skinsrestorer.2124/) (Optional) - Restart the server - Done! # Need support? Make sure to join our [discord server](https://discord.gg/kMUSvP92fh) to get support, we will respond as soon as we can, don't hesitate to join!

PLEASE READ THE WIKI BEFORE CONTACTING SUPPORT

THE REVIEWS SECTION IS NOT FOR REPORTING BUGS

(This plugin uses bStats to keep track of how many servers/players are using this plugin, there is no sensitive information that will be collected!)
